notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Luis Torrens out on a sacrifice bunt to catcher Joe Mack. Marcus Semien scores. Throwing error by catcher Joe Mack.

notableEvents.label: MJ Melendez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: MJ Melendez out on a sacrifice fly to left fielder Kyle Stowers. Bo Bichette scores.

notableEvents.label: MJ Melendez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: MJ Melendez homers (3) on a fly ball to right field. Vidal Bruján scores.

notableEvents.detail: Marcus Semien singles on a sharp ground ball to left fielder Kyle Stowers. Marcus Semien to 2nd. Marcus Semien advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by left fielder Kyle Stowers.
